<!-- indicator: tbl-infant-mortal-rate (fallback) -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: tbl-infant-mortal-rate
#| tbl-cap: 'Table showing Infant mortal rate.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_table_object
render_table_object(object_id="tbl-infant-mortal-rate", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH)
```
